description.en: Spectral clustering reframed grouping as a graph problem. Points become nodes, similarities become weighted edges, and eigenvectors of graph matrices reveal low-dimensional structure where difficult cuts become easier to separate.
description.zh: 谱聚类把分组重新表述为图问题。样本成为节点，相似度成为带权边，图矩阵的特征向量揭示低维结构，使原本困难的切分更容易分离。

html.en: Image segmentation and data clustering needed methods that could separate non-convex groups without assuming spherical geometry.
html.zh: 图像分割与数据聚类需要能分离非凸群组的方法，而不假设簇是球形。

html.en: The method builds an affinity graph, computes spectral embeddings from graph Laplacian eigenvectors, and clusters or cuts in that embedded space.
html.zh: 该方法构建亲和图，从图拉普拉斯特征向量计算谱嵌入，再在嵌入空间中聚类或切分。

html.en: Experts generally treat spectral clustering as a major graph-based approach to grouping non-convex data. Its long-term legacy is the use of graph Laplacian eigenvectors to connect image segmentation, manifold learning, graph clustering, and modern graph data analysis.
html.zh: 专家通常把谱聚类视为处理非凸数据分组的重要图方法。它的长期影响在于用图拉普拉斯特征向量连接图像分割、流形学习、图聚类和现代图数据分析。

method.zh: 图拉普拉斯特征向量嵌入

artifact.en: Normalized cuts and spectral clustering methods
artifact.zh: Normalized Cuts 与谱聚类方法

material.en: PAMI normalized-cuts paper and spectral clustering analysis
material.zh: PAMI Normalized Cuts 论文与谱聚类分析

demo.en: Turn similarities into a graph and split by eigenvectors
demo.zh: 把相似度转成图并用特征向量切分

text.en: Edges encode similarity between data points.
text.zh: 边编码样本之间的相似度。

text.en: A matrix representation exposes connectivity structure.
text.zh: 矩阵表示揭示连通结构。

text.en: Eigenvectors place points in a space where clusters separate.
text.zh: 特征向量把样本放入更易分离的空间。

title.zh: 归一化切分与图像分割

description.en: IEEE paper connecting graph cuts, eigenvectors, and segmentation for spectral clustering.
description.zh: IEEE 论文：将图切分、特征向量和分割与谱聚类联系起来。
